Name: Rise To Fame [Documentary]
Notes: Documentary on Cartis rise to fame, recording started in late 2015 and lasted until 2019. Presumably ends with footage of a Carti & Yung Lean studio session (presumably the same session Yung Lean mentioned in a 2025 interview). Being sold for for roughly $5,000 & is 4 hours long. Includes various unheard songs and interviews.
